description: Style NoteA grey top with unusual styling detail marks this vero moda top out. A must have option in your evening wear wardrobe, this is both fashion-forward and feminine and will look great paired with smart jeans and slick heels. Product DetailsDark grey woven top with transparent short raglan sleeves, has a round neckline with frill from the shoulders extending to the back, metal zip at the back, has dolby print on the front and lining inside Material and Care100% polyesterMachine wash coldDo not bleach or tumble dry Use cool ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
